fields.title: submit_result retry loop for structured output reliability
fields.description: ## ProblemnnWhen a subagent is spawned with result_schema, tau tells it to call submit_result via system prompt and sets toolOnlyStreamFn, but if the agent ignores it, hallucinates, or the turn ends without calling submit_result, the structured output is silently lost. The agent completes but structuredOutput remains undefined.nn## SolutionnnPort the retry pattern from oh-my-pi: when the agent_end event fires and result_schema was requested but structuredOutput is still undefined, re-prompt the agent with a reminder and forced toolChoice targeting submit_result. Retry up to 3 times.nn## Implementation detailsnnFile: extensions/tau/src/agent/worker.tsnnIn the subscribeToSession() method, the agent_end event handler (around line ~460) currently checks for stopReason=error and stopReason=aborted but does NOT check whether a required submit_result was actually called.nnAdd retry logic:n1. In the agent_end handler, before publishing completed status, check: if this.infra.resultSchema is set AND this.structuredOutput is undefined, do NOT complete — instead re-prompt.n2. The retry should use session.prompt() with a reminder message like: 'You must call submit_result with JSON matching the schema. This is attempt N of 3.'n3. Use toolChoice/streamingBehavior to force the agent to call submit_result.n4. Track retry count (max 3 attempts). After exhausting retries, publish failed status with reason 'Agent did not call submit_result after N retries'.n5. The retry logic needs to handle the async nature — the agent_end handler in subscribeToSession is sync (callback), so the retry needs to be fired via Effect.runFork or similar, similar to how runWithModelFallback is already forked in prompt().nnKey reference - oh-my-pi's implementation in .reference/oh-my-pi/packages/coding-agent/src/task/executor.ts:n```typescriptnconst MAX_SUBMIT_RESULT_RETRIES = 3;nwhile (!submitResultCalled && retryCount < MAX_SUBMIT_RESULT_RETRIES) {n  await session.prompt(reminder, { toolChoice: buildNamedToolChoice('submit_result') });n  await session.waitForIdle();n}n```nn## TestingnnRun npm run gate from extensions/tau/. Verify typecheck + lint + existing tests pass. No new test file needed for this change (the retry is internal behavior).nn## Quality gatennMUST run 'npm run gate' in extensions/tau/ before declaring done.
fields.notes: Implemented submit_result retry handling in src/agent/worker.ts with a 3-attempt counter, extension re-prompts from agent_end, and failure after retries are exhausted. npm run gate passed in extensions/tau.
fields.close_reason: Implemented submit_result retry loop and verified with npm run gate in extensions/tau.
